title: [ExportVerilog] Add explicit bitcast for width mismatch LINT errors

features.name: width_mismatch_multiplication_assignment
features.description: Code should include a multiplication of two operands assigned to a narrower wire, causing width mismatch between the 2*N-bit product and N-bit target

features.name: explicit_bitcast_on_arithmetic_result
features.description: Code should include an explicit bitcast using width'(expression) syntax on an arithmetic result to avoid implicit truncation lint errors
